name: @pryzm/plugin-ifc-import
description: PRYZM 2 — IFC Tier 2 import plugin (Phase 3-B Sprint S57). Reads IFC4 STEP files via web-ifc and produces transform-only proxies (IFCProxyDTO) for Tier 2 entities (furniture, structural proxy, MEP equipment) per PHASE-3B-Q2-M28-M30-IFC-REVIT-COMPONENT-EDITOR.md §3.1. Closes the round-trip with @pryzm/plugin-ifc-export by repopulating the side-car IFCMetaStore on import. Pure TS / Node-compatible.
